OUR SPECIALITIES

What makes Biryani Baithak truly authentic.

ROYAL SPICES

Infused with the finest saffron, star anise, and cinnamon.

SLOW COOKED

Prepared in traditional clay pots to seal in the authentic flavors.

PERFECT AROMA

A mesmerizing blend that awakens the senses before the first bite.

FEEL THE HEAT

DAY-WISE SPECIALS

A unique authentic dish featured for every day of the week.
